reasons: Novaria's Astral Echo reveals enemies and increases hitbox size, helping Franco aim Iron Hook at marked targets.
Franco can convert Novaria's scouting into a direct pickoff through hook or suppression.

proof.summary: Novaria marks and reveals targets, while Franco uses that information to hook or suppress a priority enemy.
worksBestWhen: Novaria marks a target before Franco commits hook.
Franco waits for a clear angle and avoids hooking through minions or tanks.
The team is ready to follow the catch.
failureCases: Novaria's mark expires before Franco acts.
The enemy hides behind frontline units despite being revealed.

reasons: Novaria can reveal the target area so Kaja can choose a better Divine Judgment angle.
Kaja's suppression gives Novaria a stable target for long-range follow-up damage.

proof.summary: Novaria gives vision and poke setup, while Kaja locks the priority target for a controlled pickoff.
worksBestWhen: Novaria reveals a carry or isolated target.
Kaja has a safe path to suppress the target.
Novaria has a clear follow-up angle.
failureCases: Kaja engages outside Novaria's follow-up angle.
The target is too tanky to finish.
The enemy team collapses after Kaja commits.

reasons: Novaria's hitbox increase and reveal can help Beatrix land long-range weapon pressure more reliably.
Beatrix gives Novaria a gold-lane follow-up damage partner who can punish marked targets from range.

proof.summary: Novaria reveals and enlarges targets, while Beatrix follows with long-range or burst weapon pressure from gold lane positioning.
worksBestWhen: Novaria marks targets before Beatrix commits a long-range shot or burst window.
The marked target is a priority target.
failureCases: Beatrix is using the wrong weapon for the follow-up angle.
Enemy dive reaches Beatrix or Novaria before the poke setup matters.

reasons: Lolita protects Novaria from projectile and ranged pressure while Novaria aims long-range poke.
Novaria benefits from a defensive roamer because she needs time and space to set vision and skillshot angles.

proof.summary: Lolita protects Novaria's casting position, letting Novaria focus on vision, poke, and hitbox setup.
worksBestWhen: Lolita stays near Novaria during siege or objective fights.
Novaria uses the protected window to cast Astral Echo or Astral Recall from safe range.
The team plays around Novaria's vision before forcing fights.
failureCases: Lolita engages forward and leaves Novaria exposed.
Novaria positions outside Lolita's shield angle.

reasons: Mathilda gives Novaria a reposition tool when enemies dive or flank her.
Novaria benefits from shield and mobility support because she needs time and space to aim long-range skillshots.

proof.summary: Mathilda helps Novaria survive pressure and reset spacing so Novaria can continue providing vision and poke.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda saves Guiding Wind for Novaria's danger window.
Novaria uses the mobility defensively and keeps safe range.
failureCases: Mathilda uses the field before Novaria is threatened.
Novaria is crowd-controlled before she can reposition.
The enemy reaches Novaria from multiple angles.
